case_title: NAKANO, SEAN VS PIERSON, DWAYNE MARCUS JR.

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR NAKANO, SEAN ASSIGNED TO HURN, MARVIN D. DBA SF JUDGMENT RECOVERY CTR.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PIERSON, DWAYNE MARCUS JR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAKANO, SEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIERSON, DWAYNE MARCUS JR. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PLTF'S DECL:INCREASE CLAIM AMT.TO $5000.00;DEMAMDE D/REFUSED TO PAY.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NAKANO, SEAN AS TO DEFENDANT PIERSON, DWAYNE MARCUS JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-02-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-15-1999, OFF CALENDAR
CERTIFIED MAIL TO DWAYNE MARCUS PIERSON, JR. RETURNED UNCLAIMED;
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,159.48 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT PIERSON, DWAYNE MARCUS JR.
